items.title: Breaking Down Q2 Retail Earnings: Good or Bad?
items.description: The Retail sector's Q2 performance compares favorably to what we have seen from these S&P 500 companies in other recent periods, particularly on the revenues side. What else should investors know?

items.description: Read here for an in-depth analysis and insights on Fundsmith's $23.02B portfolio shift: new stakes, exits, and top positions like Meta and Microsoft.

items.title: Earnings live: Nvidia stock falls on data center revenue miss, Snowflake pops, CrowdStrike drops
items.description: The gush of second quarter earnings reports is beginning to slow to a trickle, and with most of the reports in, the results have been mostly positive.

items.title: Pfizer: Finally Some Fortune, Plus Twenty High-Quality Dividend Growth Valuations

items.title: WSM Stock Up on Q2 Earnings & Revenue Beat, FY25 View Up
items.description: Williams-Sonoma posts Q2 earnings and revenue beat and lifts fiscal 2025 outlook as comps rebound and margins expand.
